title: Pakistan-US-Iran Nuclear Talks: Gen Munir in Tehran — Iran agrees to third-party monitoring proposal
snippet: Iran agreed in principle to Pakistani proposal for third-party monitoring of nuclear programme by 4 countries + IAEA. Tehran conveyed acceptance to Munir. US has not formally responded. Options for 440kg enriched uranium: send abroad to third party or downblend to 3%. Technical teams in continuous message exchanges. Munir may travel to Washington for direct talks with Trump.
tag_reason: 4/16 무니르 방문의 후속이나 핵심 새 정보: 이란의 제3자 모니터링 수용 (원칙적), 440kg 처리 옵션, 무니르 워싱턴 방문 가능성
